name: 5q31_3_protocadherin_cluster
description: 5q31.3 clustered protocadherin locus — PCDHA (15 paralogs), PCDHB (16 paralogs), PCDHG (22 paralogs). Each variable exon encodes a complete EC-domain ectodomain; tandemly duplicated at very high identity (~85-95%) with shared constant exons. Choice of expressed variable exon is stochastic and methylation-controlled; the locus is the largest mammalian SD-paralog gene-array outside the immunoglobulin loci.

architecture.internal_structure: Three sub-clusters PCDHA (15 variable + 3 constant), PCDHB (16 single-exon), PCDHG (22 variable + 3 constant); each variable exon ~2.4 kb with promoter; paralog identity 85-95%; recent gene-conversion events ongoing.
